title: port_dispatch.rs: DispatchError::PayloadTooShort mapped to UnknownPort(0) loses info
description:
In the From<DispatchError> for UdpDispatchError impl, PayloadTooShort is mapped to UnknownPort(0) with a comment 'shouldn't happen'. This loses error information and port 0 is a valid (if unusual) port number. Either add a PayloadTooShort variant to UdpDispatchError or use a different sentinel.

File: rust/lichen-node/src/port_dispatch.rs lines 82-87
close_reason: Already fixed - UdpDispatchError has PayloadTooShort variant (line 73) and From impl correctly maps DispatchError::PayloadTooShort to Self::PayloadTooShort (line 93)
